reviews.review_description: Takes an age to load, longer for additional content and for what? A brief not very interesting VR experience. Almost as dull and pointless as the film.
Not worth downloading. Seriously, don't waste your time and data.

This is just a 360 movie. The movie itself is interesting. The player however is not so good. It's jerky and was fast to put the phone into thermal throttling. There are good examples like pigasus and netflix that show you don't need to be jerky to get good video playback. Pigasus even streams from wifi, is not jerky and  doesn't go into thermal throttle as long as you don't interfere with the playing.
This of course is on the latest and greatest available galaxy note in the netherlands: the note 4.

reviews.review_title: Fails to load video missing video files
reviews.review_description: Again, this app doesn't contain actual CONTENT, it streams content from a server which is long since shut down.  So, it does NOTHING but wait to "load" something which is no longer there.

A very basic version of the opening scene. Almost like those bland low quality CGI recreations they show on the news. Did the assailant wall run and shoot the victims. We'll miss that out in the recreation because its too technical!
Very bad not starting
.....no comment......
It could be a great experience but the video is really badly encoded with all the artefacts and stutters. It is 3D though.

Animations and resolution are suprisingly bad. Videos like Avenger Tower or Invasion look much much better. This looks like badly streamed content. I am a fan of Ghost in the Shell ... but this isn't good enough.
This will not play on my s7edge. installed 4 times, still no go!

reviews.review_title: Must try if you love sci fi
reviews.review_description: Very kool nice grfx impressiv not very long
Now thats Vr , totally   awesome.

This feels like it was barely finished, like they were using scrapped CGI test footage to be used for a 360 video. I understand it can be difficult to compress a video file this complex, but c'mon people... 
This wasn't even as close to being 3d as watching the movie in theatres. 
It's just a 360 movie that probably wouldn't have even made it on the Within app.
For a prerendered movie the quality is very poor. It looks like cg graphics of the 90s.

reviews.review_title: Not for real fans (of VR or GitS)
reviews.review_description:
This is just a 5 min., 360 degrees monoscopic (not 3D) trailer for the 2017 live action movie, and not worth the 482mb download (IMNSHO). Visuals are so-so, action is boring and in slow motion, and there is nothing in terms of story. You can't even pause or rewind the movie with this "app", yet you can watch the same video via Facebook as well (even stream it with the Oculus Video app, it is currently in the Facebook Videos section). If you want a much better VR GitS experience, search for "Virtual Reality Diver" on YouTube.

BTW, I tested this on a Note 4. It played mostly OK, but there was some jitter and tearing (certainly something NOT intentionally done by the creators).
No instructions. Not scary

reviews.review_title: L o a d I n g....
reviews.review_description: Did anyone ever get it to finish loading?🤦‍♂️😫

Looks like garbage due to heavy compression artifacts, and the CG is junk too. Looks like it was made by a first year animation student.

I was quite disappointed with  ghost in a shell  it down loaded but when I opened it up it went into darkness and loading and that’s all it ever did very disappointing I hope I didn’t get charged for this app￼.
